text:
No MA and PDP CAHPS survey administration occurred in 2020.
This data dictionary is presented in two volumes (indicated by Version 2 on the title page). Volume 1 contains content 
speciﬁc to the Medicare Advantage (MA) and Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) CAHPS surveys. Volume 2 contains content 
speciﬁc to the Original Medicare survey. Other data dictionaries are presented in a combined format (indicated by Version 1 
on the title page).
